MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Selina Henry, Defendant
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs SELINA HENRY and ALLEN HENRY's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND:

Defendants' motion to set aside default is granted. No opposition filed. 20 days to answer.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
